infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Pantra needs your location to find nearby drivers and show your trip on the map.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Pantra needs your location in the background to track your trip.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Pantra needs your location to find nearby drivers and show your trip on the map.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Pantra uses the microphone for voice features.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Pantra accesses your photos to let you upload your profile picture and driver documents.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Pantra uses the camera to let you capture and upload driver documents.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Pantra needs your location to find nearby drivers and show your trip on the map.

plugins.microphonePermission: Pantra uses the microphone for voice features.

plugins.photosPermission: Pantra accesses your photos to let you upload your profile picture and driver documents.
plugins.cameraPermission: Pantra uses the camera to capture driver documents.
